variants.name: Vaughan
meanings: Welsh: from fychan, a lenited form of bychan, a diminutive of bach ‘little’. This was often used to distinguish the younger of two bearers of the same personal name, typically the son of a father with the same name.

nameMeanings.name: Mathilde
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Matilda
meanings: Latinized form of a Germanic personal name derived from maht, meht ‘might’ + hild ‘battle’. This was the name of an early German queen ( 895–968 ), wife of Henry the Fowler, who was noted for her piety and generosity. It was also the name of the wife of William the Conqueror and of the daughter of Henry I of England ( see Maud ). The name was introduced into England by the Normans, and this Latinized form is the one that normally occurs in medieval records, while the vernacular form Maud was the one in everyday use. Matilda was revived in England as a learned form in the 18th century.

en.lifeSummary: When Mathilde von Groitzsch was born in 1185, in Groitzsch, Groitzsch, Kreis Delitzsch, Saxony, Germany, her father, Conrad II Margrave of Lusatia, was 26 and her mother, Elzbieta Piast Duchess of Bohemia, was 33. She married Markgraf Albrecht II. von Brandenburg in 1205, in Brandenburg an der Havel, Brandenburg, Germany. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 2 daughters. She died in 1225, in Brandenburg an der Havel, Brandenburg, Germany, at the age of 40, and was buried in Lehnin, Potsdam-Mittelmark, Brandenburg, Germany.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Mathilde von Groitzsch est née en 1185, à Groitzsch, Groitzsch, Kreis Delitzsch, Sachsen, Allemagne, son père, Conrad II Margrave of Lusatia, avait 26 ans et sa mère, Elzbieta Piast Duchess of Bohemia, avait 33 ans. Elle a épousé Markgraf Albrecht II. von Brandenburg en 1205, à Brandenburg an der Havel, Brandenburg, Allemagne. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée en 1225, à Brandenburg an der Havel, Brandenburg, Allemagne, à l’âge de 40 ans, et a été enterrée à Lehnin, Landkreis Potsdam-Mittelmark, Brandenburg, Allemagne.

Sie hat 1205 in Brandenburg an der Havel, Brandenburg, Deutschland Markgraf Albrecht II. von Brandenburg geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 2 Töchter. ko.lifeSummary: Mathilde von Groitzsch(이)가 1185년 독일 작센 크레이스 데리츠슈 그로이츠슈 그로이츠슈에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Conrad II Margrave of Lusatia(은)는 26세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Elzbieta Piast Duchess of Bohemia(은)는 33세였다. 그녀는 1205년 독일 브랜덴버그 브랜덴버그 앤 데르 하벨에서 Markgraf Albrecht II. von Brandenburg(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1225년 독일 브랜덴버그 브랜덴버그 앤 데르 하벨에서 40세의 나이로 사망했으며 독일 브랜덴버그 랜드크레이스 포츠다-미텔마크 레h닌에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Mathilde von Groitzsch nasceu em 1185, em Groitzsch, Groitzsch, Kreis Delitzsch, Sachsen, Alemanha, seu pai, Conrad II Margrave of Lusatia, tinha 26 anos e sua mãe, Elzbieta Piast Duchess of Bohemia, tinha 33 anos. Ela casou-se com Markgraf Albrecht II. von Brandenburg em 1205, em Brandenburg an der Havel, Brandenburg, Alemanha. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 2 filhas. Ela faleceu em 1225, em Brandenburg an der Havel, Brandenburg, Alemanha, com 40 anos, e foi sepultada em Lehnin, Landkreis Potsdam-Mittelmark, Brandenburg, Alemanha.

ru.Groitzsch, Groitzsch, Kreis Delitzsch, F: гроицщ, гроицщ, крис делицщ, сачсен, Германия
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Mathilde von Groitzsch родилась в 1185 г. в местности гроицщ, гроицщ, крис делицщ, сачсен, Германия, её отцу по имени Conrad II Margrave of Lusatia было 26 лет, а матери, которую звали Elzbieta Piast Duchess of Bohemia, 33. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Markgraf Albrecht II. von Brandenburg в 1205 г. в местности брэнденбург ан дир хавел, брэнденбург, Германия. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 2 дочери. Она умерла в 1225 г. в местности брэнденбург ан дир хавел, брэнденбург, Германия в возрасте 40 лет и была похоронена в местности лэнин, ландкрис поцдам-миттелмарк, брэнденбург, Германия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Mathilde von Groitzsch nació en 1185, en Groitzsch, Groitzsch, Kreis Delitzsch, Sachsen, Alemania, su papá, Conrad II Margrave of Lusatia, tenía 26 años y su mamá, Elzbieta Piast Duchess of Bohemia, tenía 33 años. Se casó con Markgraf Albrecht II. von Brandenburg en 1205, en Brandenburg an der Havel, Brandenburg, Alemania. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió en 1225, en Brandenburg an der Havel, Brandenburg, Alemania, a la edad de 40 años, y fue sepultada en Lehnin, Landkreis Potsdam-Mittelmark, Brandenburg, Alemania.
